decision.next_action: PR #237 merged. Create docs PR for README/state.json. Then: actions/checkout@v6 upgrade (Issue #240). Dependabot PR #23/#20 Test CI pending.

learning.last_failure_pattern: pwa.test.tsx used `module` variable name - conflicts with Node.js global, blocked by next/core-web-vitals lint rule
learning.improvement_notes: 1) Always test with `next lint` in CI dir, not project root. 2) Suspense wrapping needed for useSearchParams. 3) Use getAllByText() when component has duplicate text nodes
